# `ContainerPlugin` manifest

Reference for `kind: ContainerPlugin` (apiVersion `vais.agents/v1`). Authoring schema: [`ContainerPlugin.schema.json`](../schemas/ContainerPlugin.schema.json).

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: vais.agents/v1
kind: ContainerPlugin
metadata:
  id: example-plugin
  version: "1.0"
  description: Example container plugin.
spec:
  image: ghcr.io/example/plugin:1.0
  port: 8080
  topology: standalone
  startupTimeoutSeconds: 30
  invokeTimeoutSeconds: 60
  imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
```
